chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 800 - وَ سَأَلَ عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ بُكَيْرٍ ، أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: فِي اَلرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ يُرْسِلُ جَانِبَيْ ثَوْبِهِ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.800 - Abdullah ibn Bukayr asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man praying while letting the sides of his garment hang loose.
Imam (as) said: "There is no issue with it”.
